findings.message: Plugin manifest declares no commands array; plugin installs without registering any /notion:* slash commands
Plugin manifest declares no skills array; plugin installs without loading any Notion workspace skills
MCP server uses external HTTP transport to mcp.notion.com; Notion workspace content traverses Notion's cloud API endpoint
MCP server registered as 'notion' in .mcp.json but called 'notionApi' in commands and referenced with 'Notion:' prefix in SKILL.md tool calls — three names for one server

Plugin manifest declares no skills array; plugin installs without loading any Notion workspace skills — plugin.json has no skills array; 4 SKILL.md files found under skills/notion/

Multi-step command (search → present results → handle empty case) uses unordered bullets instead of numbered steps — Behavior section uses bullet list; no numbered steps for the search-then-present-then-handle-empty flow

Multi-step command (search → summarize results → handle empty case) uses unordered bullets instead of numbered steps — Behavior section uses bullet list; no numbered steps for the search-then-summarize-then-handle-empty flow

Command has a multi-step execution flow (fetch changes, create Notion page, write each section) but provides no numbered process steps — only output structure sections — File has Task/Input/Sections/Formatting headers but no numbered execution steps at top level

Setup wizard has a multi-step flow (choose path → execute path → verify access → confirm) but lacks numbered top-level steps — Two-path wizard uses ### headers with sub-bullets; no numbered top-level process steps

'sensible' and 'brief' are vague quantifiers that leave the scope of the default structure and the length of the clarification undefined — 'sensible default structure' line 14; 'brief clarification question' line 13

'appropriate', 'confidently', and 'concise' are vague quantifiers leaving selection criteria and question scope undefined — 'appropriate Tasks database' line 17; 'confidently identified' line 27; 'concise clarification' line 27

'reasonable' and 'compact' are vague; the example range partially anchors the former but the latter is undefined — 'reasonable number of rows (e.g. 20-50)' line 16; 'compact table-like format' line 18
'best matches' is undefined; the 5-10 range hint partially constrains it but 'best' still lacks a ranking criterion — 'best matches' line 19; 'better to show 5-10 very relevant results'
'high-signal' and 'short' are undefined; leaves tool selection and result count ambiguous — 'high-signal tools' line 13; 'short, scannable list' line 14
'short generic' and 'brief' leave Agent Status field length undefined; examples partly help but the rule remains vague — 'short generic text description' line 22; 'keep it brief' line 28

'broadly', 'liberally', and 'medium difficulty' are vague scope/frequency/difficulty terms with no measurable bound — 'broadly explore surrounding code' line 16; 'use figures liberally' line 22; 'medium difficulty' in quiz section
'a few', 'too many', and 'briefly' leave question batching and summary length undefined — 'ask just a few questions at a time' line 28; 'too many questions' line 28; 'briefly tell the user' line 34
'helpful' is a vague quality descriptor with no measurable criterion — 'Be conversational and helpful' line 38

Five or more distinct vague quantifiers across the skill; penalty capped at -20 — 'appropriate documentation format' step 2; 'relevant metadata' step 3; 'appropriate title' step 5; 'properly connected' line 108; 'periodically' line 180

Four or more distinct vague quantifiers with 'relevant' appearing 10+ times; penalty capped at -20 — 'relevant pages' appears 10+ times; 'recent updates' line 51; 'important meetings' line 187; 'Enrich thoughtfully' line 266

Three or more distinct vague quantifiers with 'relevant' appearing 8+ times; penalty capped at -20 — 'relevant content' step 2; 'relevant sources' step 2; 'appropriate documentation template' step 4; 'recent' in Best Practices
Two or more distinct vague quantifiers with 'relevant' appearing 6+ times; penalty capped at -20 — 'appropriate location' step 4; 'relevant resources' step 8; 'relevant pages' appears 6+ times
